assessment.note: He is withholding questions to avoid interrupting people, which strongly signals unclear norms for when and how to ask for context.

new_queue.label: Notes doc questions
new_queue.name: What kinds of questions are sitting in that notes doc right now?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific unanswered questions Riley is holding back so the manager can remove friction.

new_queue.label: Missing context
new_queue.name: What are you still waiting to understand before you change an architecture assumption?
new_queue.description: Finds the specific context gaps that could lead to wrong technical decisions.

new_queue.label: Support network
new_queue.name: Who would you want to pull in first when you need context fast?
new_queue.description: Looks for the people and channels that should become Riley’s default support network.

new_queue.label: Next support
new_queue.name: What would make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the check-in into concrete onboarding support and next-step alignment.
